_schema.events: Append-only log of SendGrid event webhooks. Pruned to last 90 days by the optimizer. Keep flat for fast scanning.

eventShape.type: delivered | open | click | bounce | unsubscribe | spamreport | dropped | deferred

_schema.aggregates: Per-draft rollups updated by webhook handler so dashboard reads are fast.
